'''Grendyl''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] member of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|Galactic Alliance Navy]], stationed onboard the [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']]. Part of the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] team stationed on the ''Ackbar'', she was present when the ship was ambushed by [[the Colony]]'s forces during the [[Dark Nest Crisis|Qoribu Crisis]]. Standing between [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]] and [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Alema Rar]], she sacrificed herself in order to save Bwua'tu, taking a full volley of [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]] to the chest.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
